title: NIGHTMIST
description:
NIGHTMIST is a tactical, body-cam styled PVE horror experience that plunges you into a dense, atmospheric forest shrouded in a supernatural fog. As a solo operative, you must navigate high-tension environments where visibility is your greatest enemy and sound is your only warning.

KEY FEATURES

• Hyper-Realistic Body-Cam Perspective: Experience the horror through a claustrophobic, high-fidelity lens designed to blur the lines between game and reality.

• Tactical PVE Combat: Engage in slow, methodical gunplay where every shot counts. Manage your ammunition and resources carefully while facing intelligent AI threats that hunt you through the mist.

• Atmospheric Horror: Utilize advanced volumetric lighting and fog effects that react to your movements, creating a constantly shifting environment where danger hides in every shadow.

• Objective-Based Gameplay: Complete high-stakes missions within the forest, retrieving vital data or clearing infested zones before the "Nightmist" consumes your position.

• Immersive Sound Design: A deep, spatial audio system ensures that every twig snap and distant growl is a gameplay cue, forcing you to rely on your ears as much as your eyes.
description_short: NIGHTMIST is a tense, tactical PvE body-cam horror game. Deploy as a solo operative into a dark forest blanketed by supernatural fog, complete high-stakes objectives, and survive the terrifying entity hunting you from the mist.
